caption: Three people sit on a stage against a purple-lit background with geometric accents. On the left, a man wears a white long-sleeved shirt and dark trousers. In the center, a woman wears a black t-shirt and black trousers. On the right, a man wears a grey suit jacket over a light-colored shirt and grey trousers. The individuals sit in gold-colored chairs; the man on the left sits behind a white, blocky, textured object resembling a stylized chest or machine with "U" markings on it. The man in the suit is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, moving his right arm and hand across his chest and outwards as the sequence progresses. The woman listens attentively, maintaining a neutral expression and resting her hands in her lap. The lighting and composition remain consistent, while the man in the suit's physical gestures evolve from a closed posture to more open hand movements.
